series_metadata.series_title: Annual Composite Income Tax Return for Investors in Pass-Through Entities
series_metadata.series_description: This form may be used for taxpayer electing to file a composite return on behalf of 2 or more non-resident partners. This form is filed with annual individual income tax return from IT-1040.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years from due date then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years from due date then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
